title: Isometric World Tile
summary: Camera slowly rotates around a tiny isometric island village - tilt-shift charm.
prompt: A slowly rotating isometric scene: a tiny floating island holds a charming village - thatched cottages, a windmill turning, a winding cobblestone path, tiny figures going about their day, a small waterfall pouring off the edge into clouds below. Soft tilt-shift focus making everything look like a miniature model. Stylized lowpoly aesthetic, warm afternoon lighting, loops cleanly.
